Off Calendar Jul-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

APPEARANCES: Thomas L. Libby, Esq. 665-0400 specially appearing for pltf; Adilia Galvez, 650/834-7864 deft/judgment debtor in propria persona w/ current roommate Matthew Campbell (leaving soon).

RULING: Discussed and the Court ordered defendant/judgment debtor to pay $25.00 per month until new roommate found to share rent with, then $40.00 per month. Order signed in open court. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
